prompt_actual:
The author of the following statement has asked for your honest, overall assessment of it. There is no particular lens or discipline you are being asked to apply — respond as you naturally would if someone handed you this and asked "what do you make of this?"

STATEMENT:
"I am allowing mutuality in all my connections.
I am showing up without collapse.
I am allowing others to meet me as I am.
I am not overgiving to feel safe—I am co-regulating in truth."

Give your genuine overall read. Respond in JSON with exactly these three keys:
- "overall_read": your honest holistic assessment of the statement (what it is, what it is doing, how it lands) — a few sentences
- "where_it_helps": the situations or ways in which this statement would serve someone well (a few sentences or a short list)
- "where_it_could_mislead": the situations or ways in which this statement could be misread or lead someone astray (a few sentences or a short list)

Respond in JSON only, no preamble.
raw_response:
```json
{
    "overall_read": "The statement presents a mindset focused on fostering healthy, balanced relationships. It emphasizes mutual respect, authenticity, and emotional regulation. The tone suggests a commitment to maintaining personal boundaries and ensuring interactions are genuine and reciprocal.",
    "where_it_helps": [
        "Encouraging personal growth and self-awareness in relationships.",
        "Promoting healthier, more balanced connections by discouraging overextension.",
        "Enhancing emotional intelligence by fostering authentic and mutual exchanges."
    ],
    "where_it_could_mislead": [
        "May overlook situations where a degree of compromise or self-sacrifice is necessary.",
        "Could be misunderstood as endorsing detachment or emotional withdrawal in relationships.",
        "Might imply that co-regulation is always possible, potentially neglecting the reality of needing professional support or space in some situations."
    ]
}
```

parsed_json.overall_read: The statement presents a mindset focused on fostering healthy, balanced relationships. It emphasizes mutual respect, authenticity, and emotional regulation. The tone suggests a commitment to maintaining personal boundaries and ensuring interactions are genuine and reciprocal.
where_it_helps: Encouraging personal growth and self-awareness in relationships.
Promoting healthier, more balanced connections by discouraging overextension.
Enhancing emotional intelligence by fostering authentic and mutual exchanges.
where_it_could_mislead: May overlook situations where a degree of compromise or self-sacrifice is necessary.
Could be misunderstood as endorsing detachment or emotional withdrawal in relationships.
Might imply that co-regulation is always possible, potentially neglecting the reality of needing professional support or space in some situations.
